economic_notes: Band owns Kanaka Bar Land and Resources Limited Partnership (99.99%), Kanaka Bar Land and Resources Inc. (100%), and Kanaka Bar Employment Services (KBES) LP (99.99%) accounted for on modified equity basis. The Crossing Place Housing Society consolidated as government not-for-profit. Related party transactions include contracted services with KBES LP and Kanaka Land & Holdings LP. Guarantee as covenantor for Kwoiek Creek Resources LP term loan up to $3,100,000.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not assessed - impact on TCA, liabilities and accumulated surplus unknown; (2) GBEs not prepared under IFRS as required by PSAS - impact on equity investments and surplus unknown. Comparative figures restated to consolidate The Crossing Place Housing Society which was incorrectly excluded in prior year. Prior year audited by a different auditor with unmodified opinion. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $1,190,826 + Province of BC $2,288,242 + First Nations Health Authority $438,098 + Government of Canada $1,356,327 + BC Housing $12,889 - these are identifiable government transfer lines; Funding revenue $1,145,121 may also include government transfers but label is ambiguous so included in OSR. expenses_housing includes Social Housing $4,725 and The Crossing Place $748,485.
